goal: Add a scoped real-adapter evidence bundle assembly step so CUDA-host outputs can be copied into the fixed bundle layout required by verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py before v0 readiness recheck. This moves the remaining M6-RC release blocker toward verifiable external evidence intake without claiming M6-RC or v0 GO.
head: 9dea880
blocked_scope: Pulling Docker images or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, endpoint transcripts, or copied external evidence bundles
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a bundle assembly helper that copies the fixed real-adapter evidence files into a caller-selected bundle directory, verifies that bundle with the existing verifier, update the CUDA handoff to call the helper, add focused tests, regenerate the CUDA handoff artifacts, rerun readiness, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Bundle assembly helper copies only the fixed files required by verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py and records missing files without weakening verifier policy
Generated CUDA handoff runs evidence_bundle_assembly after rc_gate_live and before v0_readiness_recheck
Focused tests cover complete bundle GO, incomplete current-style NOT_GO, and generated handoff command order
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not pull Docker images, run CUDA training, run Docker endpoint capture, or commit copied external evidence bundles.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped evidence bundle assembly gate to make external CUDA-host evidence portable before v0 readiness recheck.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py requires five fixed filenames and the CUDA handoff previously called bundle verification directly without first assembling a portable bundle directory.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/build_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py, integrated it into scripts/build_real_adapter_handoff.py as evidence_bundle_assembly, added focused tests, and regenerated artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.*.
phase_notes.check: Focused tests passed, local /tmp bundle assembly produced expected NOT_GO, generated handoff JSON and shell syntax passed, v0 readiness remained expected NOT_GO, and M1 smoke bootstrap passed in .venv.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real-adapter evidence bundle assembly helper, CUDA handoff integration, focused tests, regenerated handoff artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no Docker pulls, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
